title: Options Income Series - Earn Double-Digit Income (January 2023)
text: We explain why selling cash-covered puts and covered calls are relatively safe choices for earning a high income. We will discuss how to formulate an options income strategy that's sustainable and repeatable.

title: Want Better Returns? Don't Ignore These 2 Finance Stocks Set to Beat Earnings
text: Investors looking for ways to find stocks that are set to beat quarterly earnings estimates should check out the Zacks Earnings ESP.

title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD's Methodology - Initial Results
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: Aflac (AFL) Rises 27.1% in 6 Months: More Growth in Store?
text: Aflac (AFL) is leading the Worksite Supplemental Health market with a 29% market share.

title: Aflac recognized for 22nd time as a Best Place to Work in IT by Foundry's Computerworld
text: Insurer ranks No. 31 among large organizations for excellence in IT employee compensation, benefits, growth opportunity COLUMBUS, Ga.

title: Financial stress casts a shadow over this holiday season
text: Aflac survey finds financial concerns can be at odds with holiday joy this season COLUMBUS, Ga. , Dec. 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- As some Americans face financial stress, holiday joy may be more difficult to come by this year, according to the recently released 2022 Aflac Holiday Health Issues Survey.

title: This Red-Hot Growth Stock Is Ready to Roar in 2023 and Beyond
text: Analysts expect shares of this pet insurer to surge higher in 2023.

title: Our Top 10 Stock Picks for 2023
text: Before we discuss the top 10 stock picks for 2023, we can all agree that the economy has two pathways from here. One, the real impact of the rate hikes sits in front of us and will trigger a deep recession in 2023.

title: Here's How Aflac Is Beating the Bear Market
text: The insurer's stock price is up over 20% this year despite the bear market.

title: 5 Stocks to Watch From the Thriving Accident & Health Insurance Industry
text: Higher claims frequency leading to upward pricing pressure, coupled with the adoption of technology, is likely to boost the performance of the Zacks Accident and Health Insurance industry players like AFL, UNM, TRUP, EIG and AMSF.

title: My Dividend Growth Portfolio November Update - Healthcare Services Group Gets The Boot
text: Estimated income for 2022 is up to a record $15,545, while the portfolio continues to crush the S&P 500. Buying was light as the market is up big from the October lows. I am skeptical of the market and expect better prices in the future.
